description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:lts-jessie Docker image. Define a .base template that caches node_modules/, runs before_script "npm i -g yarn@^1.9" and "yarn", and declares artifacts paths dist/ and .quasar/. Add three jobs: lint in the test stage extending .base and executing "yarn lint"; build in the build stage extending .base and executing "yarn build"; and pages in the deploy stage extending .base, limited to the master branch and excluding schedules, running "PUBLIC=vuenote yarn build", then "mkdir public" and "mv dist/pwa-mat/* public", and publishing the public/ directory as an artifact while overriding artifacts to only include public/.
